description: Move a unified knowledge document or directory within its knowledge type tree. Document paths must end with `.md`; directory paths do not. Returns a plain-text status line.

kind.description: Whether the target is a knowledge document or a knowledge directory.

path.description: Current type-prefixed path. Use a `.md` suffix for `kind=document`; omit `.md` for `kind=directory`.

newPath.description: Target type-prefixed path. Use a `.md` suffix for `kind=document`; omit `.md` for `kind=directory`. Keep it inside the same top-level type tree.
